allow: PowerShell(cd "f:\\Work\\Project\\next-zhuxb-blog"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("locales\\en.json"\); $lineStart = 0; $lineNum = 0; for\($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if\($bytes[$i] -eq 10\) { $lineNum++; if\($lineNum -eq 16\) { $lineStart = $i + 1; break } } }; "Line 17 starts at byte offset: $lineStart"; $lineEnd = $lineStart; for\($i=$lineStart; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if\($bytes[$i] -eq 10\) { $lineEnd = $i; break } }; "Line 17 ends at byte offset: $lineEnd"; $line17bytes = $bytes[$lineStart..\($lineEnd-1\)]; "Raw bytes:"; \($line17bytes | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' ')
